repos.name: msitarzewski/agency-agents
repos.desc: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

repos.name: usestrix/strix
repos.desc: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

repos.name: HKUDS/Vibe-Trading
repos.desc: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"

repos.name: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
repos.desc: A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video.

repos.name: facebook/astryx
repos.desc: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

repos.name: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
repos.desc: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.

repos.name: allenai/olmocr
repos.desc: Toolkit for linearizing PDFs for LLM datasets/training

repos.name: logto-io/logto
repos.desc: 🧑‍🚀 Authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI apps, built on OIDC and OAuth 2.1 with multi-tenancy, SSO, and RBAC.

repos.name: togatoga/karukan
repos.desc: Japanese Input Method System for Linux, macOS, Neural Kana-Kanji Conversion Engine

repos.name: Mebus/cupp
repos.desc: Common User Passwords Profiler (CUPP)

repos.name: Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw
repos.desc: 基于 AI Agent + MCP 工具链 + 渗透 Skill 编排， 配合大语言模型， 自然语言输入 → 自动完成「信息收集 → 漏洞发现 → 漏洞利用 → 报告生成」全流程。

repos.name: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
repos.desc: 12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

repos.name: refactoringhq/tolaria
repos.desc: Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases

repos.name: ogulcancelik/herdr
repos.desc: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

repos.name: 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence
repos.desc: 18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council

repos.name: altic-dev/FluidVoice
repos.desc: Fastest and only macOS Dictation app with on-device STT and custom trained AI enhancement model - Local Wispr Flow alternative. One ⭐ takes us a long way :)) Windows, iOS and Linux coming soon.

repos.name: CoreBunch/Instatic
repos.desc: Instatic is a modern self-hosted visual CMS - get it running in 1 minute

repos.name: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
repos.desc: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

repos.name: browser-use/video-use
repos.desc: Edit videos with coding agents

repos.name: yikart/AiToEarn
repos.desc: Let's use AI to Earn!

blog_md:
# 🚀 今日 GitHub 热搜：agency-agents 霸榜，开发者集体失眠

> 📅 2026-07-02  |  🔍 共收录 20 个热门项目

早上好，各位键盘侠。今天的 GitHub Trending 告诉我们：世界各地的开发者们依然在不睡觉地写代码。以下是今日战况 ⬇️

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**Python**: 6 | **TypeScript**: 6 | **Rust**: 3 | **Shell**: 2 | **HTML**: 1

> Python 选手：pip install 一下，问题解决了一半。另一半是版本冲突。

---

## 🔥 热门项目 Top 10
